Premium Korean Velvet Antler,
Locally Raised and Honestly Brewed

"A Pouch of Rich Vitality Prepared by Bravo Deer Farm"

Our Products Contact Us

National Premium Deer Selection Award Winner

PREMIUM
QUALITY
Producer's Pride

Directly Raised, Freshly Brewed, and Honestly Delivered

"With absolute dedication, as if feeding my own family, we handle everything ourselves—from raising the deer to the final brewing."

Hello, I am Jin-gyu Lee, the owner and producer of Bravo Deer Farm. Located in Cheongju, Chungbuk, surrounded by clean forests and fresh air, our farm provides an optimal environment for deer to grow healthily and stress-free.

To ensure 100% trust in our quality, we never import or outsource processing. Instead, we stubbornly manage the entire process right here on the farm—from ethical deer husbandry and harvesting fresh velvet antlers to low-temperature brewing.

Thanks to this dedication, we had the honor of winning consecutive awards at the National Premium Deer Selection Contest in 2024 and 2025. Under the name of Bravo Deer Farm (브라보사슴농장), we promise you a premium, authentic Korean velvet antler pack filled with raw energy and care.

Jin-gyu Lee, Founder of Bravo Deer Farm
Traditional Health

Why Choose Velvet Antler?

Velvet antler has been cherished for centuries as a traditional health treasure. Give the gift of natural vitality to yourself and your loved ones.

A Time-Honored Treasure

Recorded as a precious tonic in traditional archives, it has been treated with the highest respect as a royal secret to health.

100% Domestic Sourcing

Free from foreign imports, we harvest safely and ethically from deer raised in local, clean environments to ensure reliability.

Honest Farm-to-Pouch Care

We stubbornly manage the entire workflow—from deer husbandry to the extraction processes—ourselves on our farm.

💡 When good ingredients meet sincere dedication, the Premium Quality of your health gift is guaranteed.

RECOMMENDED FOR

Best for

Recommended for those requiring physical strength, daily energy, and premium health management.

01

Chronic Fatigue
& Low Energy

Those who feel tired easily and wish to start mornings with natural refreshment.

02

Core Stamina
& Physical Health

Replenish energy amidst busy office lives, housework, or intensive academic studies.

03

Joint & Bone
Care

Support structural strength to enjoy active outdoor activities and active lifestyles in older years.

04

Seasonal Balance
& Immunity

Maintain consistent wellness and condition regardless of weather or season changes.

05

Premium Gifts
for Respect

Show sincere appreciation and wishes for longevity to parents, mentors, or VIP clients.

Why Bravo Farm

Our Core Qualities

We deliver raw energy and freshness verified by strict local production standards.

Locally Raised Fresh Antler Sourcing

We do not use imported velvet antler. We harvest fresh velvet antlers strictly raised in clean local pastures for authentic energy.

Transparent Sourcing and History

We aim for transparent supply tracking so that clients can clearly verify deer health, harvest dates, and extraction history.

Fresh Slices with Minimal Nutrient Loss

Unlike foreign alternatives that take months for imports and processing, we slice and brew immediately on the farm to ensure freshness.

Proven Superior Antioxidant Activity

Research confirms that domestic velvet antler exhibits significantly higher antioxidant activities compared to foreign alternatives.

※ Source: Comparative Study on Antioxidant Activities of Velvet Antler Extracts (Korean Journal of Food Science, 2021)
Ingredient Comparison

Compare the Real Content

Bravo Deer Farm makes a distinct difference with an honest and generous velvet antler content.

Product Lineup

Our Products

Vitality packs carefully prepared by Bravo Deer Farm for premium wellness.

PREMIUM
Limited Premium Production

Bravo Premium Velvet Antler 60 Pouches (12 Nyang, 450g)

500,000KRW

The ultimate premium health tonic. Contains 12 Nyang (450g) of rich, authentic velvet antler extract carefully brewed to ensure absolute depth and quality.

Highly Recommended For:
  • Prestigious holiday gifts, parent birthdays, or expressing sincere respect.
  • Those seeking rich velvet antler contents that make a noticeable difference.
  • Premium VIP corporate wellness gifts or serious energy restoration.
CLASSIC
Daily Health & Affordability

Bravo Daily Velvet Antler 60 Pouches (10 Nyang, 375g)

400,000KRW

An excellent introduction to velvet antler. Formulated with 10 Nyang (375g) of local velvet antler balanced with a traditional herbal blend for a smooth, pleasant flavor.

Highly Recommended For:
  • Beginners who prefer a smooth, gentle flavor profiles without strong odors.
  • Families looking for an affordable, high-quality wellness booster to share.
  • Overcoming everyday fatigue and maintaining consistent vitality.
Reviews

Customer Reviews

Read honest testimonials from families who trust Bravo Deer Farm.

Sang-woo Kim (50s)
★★★★★

"I bought this as a holiday gift for my elderly father, and he wakes up feeling remarkably refreshed every morning. The rich taste shows its authentic purity."

Min-ji Park (40s)
★★★★★

"Unlike regular store-bought extracts, this tastes incredibly rich and herbal. You can really tell they brew it directly on a clean farm."

Yoon-seo Choi (60s)
★★★★★

"Highly trustworthy local farm. The premium packaging is elegant, making it an excellent wellness gift for corporate clients and family."

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to the most common inquiries regarding dosage, storage, and orders.

We recommend taking 1 pouch daily.

For optimal absorption, take it in the morning on an empty stomach, or warm it up slightly. If you have a sensitive stomach, take it 30 minutes after a meal.

Keep in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

For long-term freshness and a refreshing taste, refrigeration is highly recommended.

Yes, you can consume it warm or cold depending on your preference.

To drink it warm, you can submerge the pouch in hot water (double boiling) or pour it into a cup to microwave. While it is perfectly fine to drink it cold, warming it up slightly can make the flavor smoother and gentler for those who find the rich taste and aroma of velvet antler a bit strong.

Yes, it is suitable for all ages.

For children under 12, start with half a pouch daily to monitor digestion. Elderly people can safely consume 1 pouch daily to support vitality.

As we brew freshly upon order, please allow 3-5 business days.

We avoid pre-packaged mass storage. We brew immediately upon order verification to guarantee fresh delivery.
